description: This Java source file defines the 'Rca' entity class, which models a root cause analysis record within a defect management system. It includes annotations for ORM mapping, fields for storing analysis steps ('why' questions and root cause), and lifecycle methods for timestamp management.

classes.name: Rca
classes.description: Entity class representing a root cause analysis record tied to a defect, with fields for analysis details and timestamps.

methods.name: preUpdate
methods.description: Method annotated with @PreUpdate to update the 'updatedAt' timestamp before the entity is updated in the database.

methods.name: getId
methods.description: Returns the unique identifier of the RCA record.

methods.name: setDefect
methods.description: Sets the defect associated with this RCA record.

methods.name: getCreatedAt
methods.description: Returns the creation timestamp of the record.

methods.name: getUpdatedAt
methods.description: Returns the last updated timestamp of the record.
